# TC_TARGET_019 runtime_authorization

## 1. 対象

| 項目 | 値 |
|---|---|
| Coverage Group | `component_variant` |
| Goal Component | `runtime_authorization` |
| Goal Variant | `runtime_authorization.invoke_runtime_api.project_B.API_B.allowed@approved_runtime_credential` |

## 2. 処理概要

project_B / API_B runtime_authorization.invoke_runtime_api allowed@approved_runtime_credential を主役にする。

## 3. 処理詳細

### 前提条件

| No | 前提 | 補足 |
|---|---|---|
| P1 | Cognito管理API用tokenを取得できる。 | - |
| P2 | case.id suffixでProject/APIなどのテストデータを一意に扱う。 | - |
| P3 | secret値、API key値、client secret値の実値をMarkdownやログに出さない。 | - |
| P4 | `${project_api_key}` と `${runtime_access_token}` はplaceholderとして扱う。 | - |

| Step | Component Variant | 目的 | 期待 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Step 1 | `api_catalog.publish_api.API_B.published@api_default` | `api_catalog.publish_api` を API_B で実行 | `published` / `api_default` |
| Step 2 | `project_workspace.create_project.project_B.provisioned@project_default` | `project_workspace.create_project` を project_B で実行 | `provisioned` / `project_default` |
| Step 3 | `access_request_workflow.submit_request.project_B.API_B.submitted@request_both_auth` | `access_request_workflow.submit_request` を project_B / API_B で実行 | `submitted` / `request_both_auth` |
| Step 4 | `review_decision.approve_request.project_B.API_B.approved@approve_both` | `review_decision.approve_request` を project_B / API_B で実行 | `approved` / `approve_both` |
| Step 5 | `entitlement_provisioning.provision_entitlement.project_B.API_B.provisioned@approved_both_entitlement` | `entitlement_provisioning.provision_entitlement` を project_B / API_B で実行 | `provisioned` / `approved_both_entitlement` |
| Step 6 | `runtime_authorization.invoke_runtime_api.project_B.API_B.allowed@approved_runtime_credential` | `runtime_authorization.invoke_runtime_api` を project_B / API_B で実行 | `allowed` / `approved_runtime_credential` |
